hero.title: About the journal
hero.subtitle: A platform for scientific research and innovation

general.title: Overview
general.text: "Scientific Journal" is a leading scientific and theoretical journal in Uzbekistan that publishes research findings. Founded in 2010, the journal regularly publishes studies in natural sciences, social sciences, humanities, and technology.

goals.title: Goals and objectives
goals.lead: The main goals of our journal are:
goals.item1: To publish and promote high-quality scientific research
goals.item2: To support young scientists and researchers
goals.item3: To develop cooperation with the international scientific community
goals.item4: To contribute to the dissemination of scientific knowledge
goals.item5: To encourage innovative ideas and research

policy.title: Publishing policy
policy.text: The journal follows an Open Access policy. This means all articles are freely available for reading and downloading. We believe scientific knowledge should be open to all interested readers.

review.title: Review process
review.lead: All submitted articles go through a two-stage review process:
review.step1_text: The editorial board checks whether the article matches the journal's aims
review.step2_text: The article is thoroughly evaluated by at least two independent specialists

indexing.title: Indexing
indexing.lead: Our journal is indexed in the following international databases:
indexing.item4: Electronic catalog of the National Library of Uzbekistan

ethics.title: Ethics and quality standards
ethics.text: We support the principles of COPE (Committee on Publication Ethics) and require authors, reviewers, and editorial members to observe high ethical standards. Plagiarism, data falsification, and other forms of academic misconduct are not permitted.

info.frequency_value:

(March, June, September, December)

hero.title: Submit article
hero.subtitle: Publish your research in our journal

header.title: Upload article
header.description: Submit your article using the form below

form.file_cta: Choose a file or drag it here
form.agreement: I have read and agree to the article requirements
form.originality: The article is my original research and has not been published elsewhere

categories.chemistry: Chemical Sciences (inorganic, organic, analytical, physical chemistry)
categories.technology: Technology Sciences (food, chemical, oil and gas technology)

sidebar.help_text: If you have questions, contact us:

fields.title: Accepted fields
fields.item1: Chemical sciences (inorganic, organic, analytical, physical chemistry)
fields.item2: Technological sciences (food, chemical, oil and gas technology)

page.title: Page parameters
page.item2: Margins: top and bottom – 2 cm; left – 3 cm; right – 1.5 cm
page.item3: All article text must be in Times New Roman, size 14

structure.title: Article structure and formatting
structure.label1: Article title — Times New Roman 14, bold, uppercase, centered
structure.label2: Author's full name — Times New Roman 14, bold, centered
structure.label3: Affiliation and position — Times New Roman 14, italic, centered
structure.sample_workplace: Tashkent Institute of Chemical Technology, Associate Professor of the Department of Technology
structure.label4: Email address — Times New Roman 14, underlined, centered
structure.label5: Abstract title — Times New Roman 14, bold, centered
structure.label6: Abstract text — Times New Roman 14, italic, justified (150–250 words)
structure.sample_annotation_text: The abstract should be written in Times New Roman 14 italic and justified. It should briefly present the purpose of the research, methods, key results, and conclusions...

article_sections.title: Article sections
article_sections.label1: Section title — Times New Roman 14, bold, UPPERCASE, centered
article_sections.label2: Main text — Times New Roman 14, justified, first-line indent 1.25 cm
article_sections.sample_text: The main text should be written in Times New Roman 14, justified, and each paragraph should begin with a 1.25 cm indent. Line spacing should be 1.15.
article_sections.lead: The article should consist of the following sections:

tables_figures.title: Tables and figures
tables_figures.intro: The table number should appear in the upper right corner, the title should be centered above the table in print letters, and the source must be clearly indicated.
tables_figures.table_label: Table title — Times New Roman 14, bold, centered (above the table)
tables_figures.figure_label: Figure — caption below the figure: Times New Roman 12, justified
tables_figures.figure_caption: Figure 1. Diagram of the chemical reaction mechanism [1]
tables_figures.item2: All tables and figures must be referenced in the text

references.title: References
references.label: Reference — Times New Roman 12, justified, APA format
references.sample: 1. Karimov, A. B., & Rahimov, S. T. (2022). Modern methods of modeling chemical processes. Journal of Chemistry and Technology, 5(2), 45–58.

additional.title: Additional requirements
additional.item2: Plagiarism: similarity index must not exceed 25%
additional.item3: The article must not have been published in other journals before
additional.item4: The article may be submitted in Uzbek, Russian, or English
additional.item5: The article title, author's full name, affiliation and position, abstract, and keywords must be provided in Uzbek, Russian, and English

editorial.intro: Our editorial board consists of highly qualified professors and associate professors who professionally review all submitted articles.

info.members_text: Professors and associate professors from prestigious higher education institutions of Uzbekistan serve on our journal's editorial board.
info.quality_text: Each article is professionally reviewed and evaluated by at least two independent reviewers.
info.international_text: Editorial board members actively participate in international scientific conferences and collaborate with foreign partners.
